  • Uses of ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig in org.maxicp.search.blackbox

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.exhaustive(BlackBoxSearch.ExhaustivePhaseOptions options)
    Sets exhaustive-phase options.
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.initialExhaustiveShare(double initialExhaustiveShare)
    Sets the optional initial exhaustive phase time share.
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.lns(BlackBoxSearch.LnsPhaseOptions options)
    Sets LNS phase options.
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.restart(BlackBoxSearch.RestartPhaseOptions options)
    Sets restart-phase options.
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.shares(double restartShare, double lnsShare, double exhaustiveShare)
    Sets time shares for restart, LNS, and exhaustive phases.
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig
    ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig.verbosity(BlackBoxSearch.Verbosity verbosity)
    Sets logging verbosity for the underlying BlackBoxSearch.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ModelingBlackBox.Result
    ModelingBlackBox.optimize(ModelDispatcher model, IntExpression[] decisionVars, Objective objective, int timeLimitInSeconds, UnaryOperator<ModelingBlackBox.OptimizeConfig> configurer)
